sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80745" key="pentafa/rmakos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντα-φάρμᾰκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80745.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consisting of five drugs</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ingredients : pentapharmacum, Hist. Aug.Hel.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
